The '''''Hyperion''''' was a [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] that was part of [[Task Force Vengeance|Task Force ''Vengeance'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
It was part of the group of reinforcements that were pulled out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|Hyperspace]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Modified Strike Cruiser]] [[Peregrine (Strike-class)|''Peregrine'']] and was [[Ambush in the Derilyn system|destroyed]] along with the rest of the group by the Rebels.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
